title: Magdana's Donkey
actors: Dudukhana Tserodze, Liana Moistsrapishvili, Mikho Borashvili
plot: Small Georgian village (ca. 1890) Magdana a widow lives in a shack with her 3 children and ekes out a living selling yogurt. When the children find a donkey lying by the road and nurse it to health, it seems the family's troubles ...
